name: Banyan Gold Corp.
description: Banyan Gold Corp. is a Canadian gold exploration company focused on advancing its flagship AurMac Property, located in the Mayo Mining District of Yukon, Canada. The property is situated adjacent to Victoria Gold's Eagle Gold Mine and Hecla Mining's Keno Hill Silver District. Banyan Gold is dedicated to growing its multi-million ounce gold resource through systematic exploration and drilling, while maintaining strong relationships with local First Nations and communities.
